findings.title: Preview/non-prod deployments share prod creds — Convidar Todos on a preview hits real recipients
findings.evidence: DATABASE_URL, YOGO_TOKEN, WA_ACCESS_TOKEN, WA_GROUP_INVITE_URL are unscoped; preview builds inherit prod values
findings.recommendation: Gate bulk endpoint on process.env.VERCEL_ENV === 'production' AND a code-side INVITE_URL_FINGERPRINT_PROD constant matching the prod URL's last 6 chars

findings.title: Endpoint trusts client-supplied recipient list
findings.evidence: Spec body is `{ phoneE164s: string[] }`; any caller can pass any list
findings.recommendation: Drop `phoneE164s` from request. Endpoint takes only `{ force, dryRun }`. Derive recipients server-side by re-running computeCoverage() and using report.missingFromGroup

findings.title: No outbound kill switch — WA_ENABLED only mutes inbound webhook
findings.evidence: isWaEnabled() is referenced only in webhook/route.ts:49
findings.recommendation: Add isOutboundEnabled() reading WA_OUTBOUND_ENABLED. Default false in non-prod envs. Bulk endpoint refuses to run when false

findings.title: Roster import is full-replace; bad paste nukes entire WhatsApp roster
findings.evidence: db.waGroupMember.deleteMany({ where: { phoneE164: { notIn: keep } } }) — small paste deletes 109 of 114 rows
findings.recommendation: Add archivedAt column for soft-delete + 50% threshold guard requiring confirmReplace flag

findings.title: No integrity guard on WA_GROUP_INVITE_URL — wrong link → wrong group → 32 mis-targeted sends
findings.evidence: Env var read raw and concatenated into template parameter with no validation
findings.recommendation: Four-layer guard: regex validation, code-side fingerprint constant, operator session-confirmation of last 6 chars, daily HEAD health check

findings.title: Concurrent bulk clicks can double-send (read-then-write race on idempotency)
findings.evidence: Per-row check reads WaOutbound before writing; two batches both observe empty state
findings.recommendation: New WaBatch table with unique constraint on kind+open-status; endpoint refuses if open batch exists

findings.title: No total-send cap; buggy caller can fire to arbitrary list size
findings.recommendation: Hard cap via WA_BULK_MAX env (default 100); sanity check recipients.length <= activeSubs.length

findings.title: Migration runner has no idempotency lint nor pre-apply schema dump
findings.evidence: Multi-statement migration with no transaction; partial-application on failure leaves _prisma_migrations row unwritten
findings.recommendation: Pre-apply: lint statements for CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS etc. + dump current schema to backups/{ts}-{commit}.sql; refuse to apply if either step fails

findings.title: Template send proceeds even when Meta template is PENDING
findings.evidence: Spec waits for Meta approval as a manual step; nothing in code enforces it
findings.recommendation: Bulk endpoint preflight: GET /message_templates?name=convite_grupo_whatsapp&language=pt_PT; refuse if status !== 'APPROVED'; cache 15min

findings.title: Single-click confirmation modal — high accidental-trigger risk
findings.evidence: Spec defines confirmation prompt with checkbox; muscle-memory click bypasses
findings.recommendation: Button label shows count ('Convidar 32 pessoas'); confirmation requires typing the count; show first 5 names + 'and N more'; disable button if roster stale or fingerprint unconfirmed

findings.title: No out-of-band notification when bulk fires
findings.evidence: Ricardo only learns by checking dashboard events
findings.recommendation: sendText to Ricardo's phone on every bulk-trigger event with count + dry-run flag; fires before batch starts

findings.title: Roster freshness has no enforcement; stale roster drives mis-targeting
findings.evidence: UI doesn't surface importedAt; bulk endpoint doesn't refuse stale roster
findings.recommendation: Show roster age prominently; refuse bulk if max(importedAt) < NOW() - 7d; warn at 24h

findings.title: Sequential loop has no checkpoint; partial failures invisible
findings.evidence: Crash at iteration 15/32 leaves no resumable state
findings.recommendation: WaBatchItem rows track per-recipient outcome; resume button picks up incomplete items; UI shows progress

findings.title: Tight inter-send gap risks WABA quality-rating degradation
findings.evidence: Cluster of 32 cold sends in 6s spikes marketing-burst pattern
findings.recommendation: Increase gap to 5min (or randomized 3-7min); total batch ~2.5h; pause if quality signals deteriorate

findings.title: Bulk button in same section header as sub list invites misclicks
findings.recommendation: Separate styled card above the list with distinct background and margin; mobile sticky bar

findings.title: Admin auth is single-factor; cookie compromise = full bulk capability
findings.evidence: password === ADMIN_PWD with no MFA or IP allow-list
findings.recommendation: Out-of-band notification (H-11) is primary mitigation; optionally rate-limit bulk endpoint to 1 call per admin session per hour

findings.title: Migration ordering relies on lexicographic sort with no prefix validation
findings.recommendation: Validate prefix regex ^\d{14}_; refuse to run if any migration dir name doesn't match

findings.title: WaOutbound.payload stores full template parameters incl. PII
findings.evidence: JSON.stringify({name, url}) persists redundantly with phoneE164
findings.recommendation: Store only { templateName, language, parameterCount } — audit trail without redundant PII

findings.title: MARKETING template ~3-4× UTILITY cost in Portugal
findings.evidence: Meta category cost differential; scales with cohort size
findings.recommendation: Submit as UTILITY first; fall back to MARKETING if rejected

hypotheses.hypothesis: Preview deployments share prod creds — Convidar Todos on a preview URL hits real recipients
Client-supplied recipient list bypasses missing-list derivation
WA_ENABLED killswitch doesn't mute bulk send
Small import paste deletes entire roster
WA_GROUP_INVITE_URL can be silently set to a wrong link
